title: Avoid using list comprehensions with any() or all()
description: Using list comprehensions with any() or all() can negatively impact performance. It's better to use built-in functions like any(), all(), or map(), filter(), or reduce() with a generator expression.
message: Avoid using list comprehensions with any() or all()
recommendation: Use generator expressions with any(), all(), or map(), filter(), or reduce() instead
why_is_this_an_issue: Using list comprehensions with any() or all() can create a temporary list, which can be slow when the list is large. Using generator expressions can help avoid this.
how_to_fix: Rewrite code using generator expressions instead of list comprehensions with any() or all()

metadata.title: Avoid using list comprehensions with any() or all()
